snippet.title: DOBRO JUTRO KOMŇ†IJA (SEZONA 3) - EPIZODA 8

Ako bismo prestali da budemo zavisni od korporacija koji kontroliŇ°u druŇ°tvene mreŇĺe, lakŇ°e bismo mogli da Ň°irimo slobodnu reńć i naŇ°e emisije bi imale mnogo veńái domet.

BALKAN INFO je nezavisna medijska produkcija osnovana u junu 2015. godine u Beogradu. Prepoznati smo kao glas svih koji ne Ňĺele da budu deo kratkotrajnih projekata i saveza, svih onih koji poŇ°tuju srpske tradicionalne vrednosti i koji ńćuvaju seńáanje na naŇ°e slavne pretke.

tekst:

bili su tuzni dani i bolelo je
on mi je uso u zivot i promenio me

al sad sta god da se desi necu ostati sam
i zato hvala ti mali s tobom sam presrecan


sedim nemam plan iz sata u sat
cekam samo kad ce proci dan

al onda cujem glas to je mali pas
nije tigar ali je bas gas

ooo blenta kada gleda me
ooo na osmeh tera me
ooo ooo
presladak je
pisa na uglu svakom

trcimo po keju
trcimo kroz park
trcimo po blatu 
svaki dan  

trcimo po knezu 
trcimo kroz grad
trcimo po stanu
svaki dan

snippet.title: Dog interrupts live weather report in Moscow borrowing journalist's microphone
snippet.description:
A correspondent's live weather report was interrupted by a dog who snatched her microphone and ran off with it. Nadezhda Serezhkina, who works for the Russian-language broadcaster Mir TV, could then be seen running after the dog who still had the colourful microphone in its mouth. The dog, and the damaged microphone, later joined Serezhkina for the end of her live broadcast

hr.title: KoŇ°arkaŇ° kontrolira Dianu | Ljubomora u tinejdŇĺerskim vezama
hr.description:
Ljubomora vrlo ńćesto kvari dobar odnos, a to se Diani dogodilo. KoŇ°arkaŇ° kontrolira Dianin svaki korak, a rekao je i da joj treba frizura. snippet.title: Lakijeva kuhinja: nas prvi recept!
snippet.description:
Za prvo video kuvanje je Laki spremio nesto sto je i meine iznenadilo! Nadam se da cete probati buduci da zaista nije tesko, a izgled i ukus su fantazija! ūüėä


HLEB KOJI SE NE MESI:
500g brasna
2 kasike maslinovog ulja
2 kasicice soli
1 kasicica secera
1/4 kasicice kvasca
3dl mlake vode

Sve sjediniti kasikom i ostaviti 18h pokriveno prijanjajucom folijom

Zatim razvlaciti (pogledati video za sistem rada) i ostaviti jos dva sata umotano u krpu.

Peci pokriveno 30 minuta na 230 stepeni, pa skinuti poklopac i peci jos 10 minuta na istoj temperature

GULAS

1kg buta ili juneceg vrata iseci na kocke velicina po zelji
4-5 glavica luka
3-4 cena belog luka
So, biber, lovor, aleva po ukusu
Crveno vino - kolicina po zelji (mi smo stavili oko 1dl)
Sok od paradajza - kolicina po zelji (mi smo stavili oko 1dl)


Prodinstati luk da omeksa, ubaciti meso, promesati i naliti sa oko pola litre vode preko mesa. Zaciniti i zaboraviti na sat ipo poklopljenu serpu na srednjoj vatri. ūü§ď

Nakon toga nalijeti malo vina i paradajz i ostaviti otvoreno da ispari sto vise tecnosti.

Izdubiti hleb, pokriti zidove cedar sirom i napuniti gulasom. Dodati persun ili druge zacine po zelji.

PRIJATNO!

Almazan https://almazankitchen.rs/shop/

*Ukoliko ispod ovog videa nisu omoguceni komentari nisam ih ja ugasila. Jutjub se bori sa zlostavljanjem dece na ovoj platiformi, pa zato gase komentare na kanalima na kojima se pojavljuju deca. Nadam se da ce uskoro pronaci najbolji nacin da komentari opet budu omoguceni, a nasa deca sigurna. Hvala vam na razumevanju!

Ana2catsbeauty.rs https://ana2catsbeauty.rs/

snippet.description:

#vanila #kolac #recept
jeftino
brzo
lako
serpica recepti

- 8 kaŇ°ika Ň°eńáera
- 2 vanilin Ň°eńáera
- 15 kaŇ°ika mleka
- 10 kaŇ°ika ulja
- 15 kaŇ°ika braŇ°na
- 1 praŇ°ak za pecivo (10 gr.)

- 700 ml. mleka
- 2 pudinga od vanile

Ň†eńáer za posipanje i po Ňĺelji vońáe, Ň°lag...umuńáena kisela pavlaka, Ň°lag i vońáe ili umuńáen Ň°lag sa jogurtom i po Ňĺelji opet vońáe ūüėÄ

en.title: Did you make this cake? Don't wait, you have all the ingredients. Baked cake with vanilla pudding.
en.description:
Make a delicious vanilla cake and soft biscuits easily, quickly and cheaply.
You must not miss the recipe. Share with others to see how nice the cake is.
#vanilla #cake #recipe
cheap
fast
easy
serpica recipes
Don‚Äôt wait a minute you have everything for him! Baked cake with vanilla pudding.

Make a delicious vanilla cake and soft biscuits easily, quickly and cheaply.
You must not miss the recipe. Share with others to see how nice the cake is.
#vanilla #cake #recipe
cheap
fast
easy
serpica recipes

Ingredients and preparation:

- 4 eggs
- 8 tablespoons of sugar
- 2 vanilla sugars
- 15 tablespoons of milk
- 10 tablespoons of oil
- 15 tablespoons of flour
- 1 baking powder (10 gr.)

- 700 ml. milk
- 2 vanilla puddings
- 5 tablespoons of sugar

Sprinkle sugar and fruit if desired, whipped cream ... whipped sour cream, whipped cream and fruit or whipped cream with yoghurt and fruit again if desired ūüėÄ

Turn the oven to 180 degrees, cover the 35x20 diameter pan with oil and flour.
Beat eggs with sugar and vanilla, add milk, oil, flour, baking powder and beat briefly until everything is mixed.
Pour half of the mixture into a pan and bake for about 10 minutes (no longer).
Meanwhile, cook the pudding.
Pour the hot pudding over the hot cake, cover with the rest of the dough and return to the oven to bake for about half an hour.
If desired, you can sprinkle the hot cake with crystal sugar and leave it to cool. Cut and enjoy! Pleasant!

Espolvoree az√ļcar y, si lo desea, fruta, nata montada ... nata agria batida, nata montada y fruta o nata montada con yogur y, si lo desea, fruta de nuevo ūüėÄ

Gire el horno a 180 grados, cubra la sart√©n de 35x20 de di√°metro con aceite y harina.
Batir los huevos con el az√ļcar y la vainilla, agregar la leche, el aceite, la harina, la levadura en polvo y batir brevemente hasta que todo est√© mezclado.
Vierta la mitad de la mezcla en una sart√©n y hornee por unos 10 minutos (no m√°s).
Mientras tanto, cocine el pud√≠n.
Vierta el bud√≠n caliente sobre el bizcocho caliente, cubra con el resto de la masa y vuelva al horno para hornear durante media hora aproximadamente.

de.title: Schnelle Rezepte. Es wird dich begeistern! Gebackener Kuchen mit Vanillepudding.
de.description:

Zutaten und Zubereitung:

- 4 Eier
- 8 Essl√∂ffel Zucker
- 2 Vanillezucker
- 15 Essl√∂ffel Milch
- 10 Essl√∂ffel √Ėl
- 15 Essl√∂ffel Mehl
- 1 Backpulver (10 gr.)

- 700 ml. Milch
- 2 Vanillepuddings
- 5 Essl√∂ffel Zucker

Streuen Sie Zucker und, falls gew√ľnscht, Obst, Schlagsahne ... Sauerrahm, Schlagsahne und Obst oder Schlagsahne mit Joghurt und, falls gew√ľnscht, wieder Obst ūüėÄ

Drehen Sie den Ofen auf 180 Grad und bedecken Sie die Pfanne mit einem Durchmesser von 35 x 20 mit √Ėl und Mehl.

In der Zwischenzeit den Pudding kochen.
Gie√üen Sie den hei√üen Pudding √ľber den hei√üen Kuchen, bedecken Sie ihn mit dem Rest des Teigs und kehren Sie zum Backen in den Ofen zur√ľck, um etwa eine halbe Stunde lang zu backen.
Auf Wunsch k√∂nnen Sie den hei√üen Kuchen mit Kristallzucker bestreuen und abk√ľhlen lassen. Schneiden und genie√üen! Angenehm!

it.title: Ricette veloci. Ti delizier√†! Torta al forno con budino alla vaniglia.
it.description:
Prepara una deliziosa torta alla vaniglia e biscotti morbidi in modo facile, veloce ed economico.
Non devi perderti la ricetta. Condividi con gli altri per vedere quanto √® bella la torta.
#vaniglia #cake #ricetta
a buon mercato
veloce
facile
ricette serpica

Ingredienti e preparazione:

- 4 uova
- 8 cucchiai di zucchero
- 2 zuccheri vanigliati
- 15 cucchiai di latte
- 10 cucchiai di olio
- 15 cucchiai di farina
- 1 lievito per dolci (10 gr.)

- 700 ml. latte
- 2 budini alla vaniglia
- 5 cucchiai di zucchero

Cospargere di zucchero e, se lo si desidera, frutta, panna montata ... panna acida montata, panna montata e frutta o panna montata con yogurt e, se lo si desidera, ancora frutta ūüėÄ

Accendere il forno a 180 gradi, coprire la teglia diametro 35x20 con olio e farina.
Sbattere le uova con lo zucchero e la vaniglia, aggiungere il latte, l'olio, la farina, il lievito e sbattere brevemente fino ad amalgamare il tutto.
Versate met√† del composto in una padella e infornate per circa 10 minuti (non di pi√Ļ).
Nel frattempo cuocere il budino.
Versate il budino caldo sulla torta calda, coprite con il resto dell'impasto e rimettete in forno a cuocere per circa mezz'ora.
Se lo desideri, puoi spolverare la torta calda con zucchero cristallino e lasciarla raffreddare. Taglia e divertiti! Piacevole!

snippet.title: Farma Vukovińá ima ovna s najveńáim rogovima
snippet.description:
PridruŇĺite se tom kanalu da biste dobili pristup pogodnostima:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIu6gtFVDK1u93irvvVrD2A/join
Farma Vukovińá iz Potkraja kod Travnika slovi za jednu od najveńáih i najsuvremenijih u kantonu SrediŇ°nja Bosna. Kontinuirano ulaŇĺu u genetski razvoj stada, suvremene strojeve koji olakŇ°avaju rad na farmi te obradu zapuŇ°tenih njiva i livada. Vlasnik Drago Vukovińá izgradio je poslovnu filozofiju koja se temelji na domańáim resursima. ViŇ°e od 90 posto hrane za svoj stońćni fond Drago proizvodi sa domańáih njiva koje su nekada bile zapuŇ°tene i zarasle u korov. Danas sa iste zemlje ubire Ňĺitarice, djetelinu i sijeno vrhunske kvalitete. ViŇ°e pogledajte u prilogu.

snippet.title: Iz Slovenije s ljubavlju - Srbija do Une, Hrvatska do Drine
snippet.description:
Otkud sad ovaj dokument za koji samo Edi Rama priznaje da ga je video, da li zaista dolazi od Janeza JanŇ°e ili je iza neko mnogo bitniji?

Kad se Jugoslavija raspadala on je bio slovenańćki ministar odbrane; sad kad je Janez JanŇ°a premijer Slovenije ponovo se govori o promeni granica na prostorima bivŇ°e Jugoslavije. I to sve zbog navodnog nezvanińćnog dokumenta koji je potekao iz Slovenije a koji predvińĎa ujedinjenje Srbije i Republike Srpske, Albanije i Kosova, Hrvatske i Zapadne Hercegovine gde veńáinski Ňĺive u Hrvati. Otkud sad ovaj dokument, za koji samo Edi Rama priznaje da ga je video, da li zaista dolazi od JanŇ°e ili je iza neko bitniji i koliko je uopŇ°te realna nova promena granica?
Prvi je to proŇ°le godine uradio tadaŇ°nji amerińćki predsednik Donald Tramp. Dva puta su Amerikanci dobili direktne uplate na rańćun. Prvi put 1.200, a drugi put 600 dolara. Vrlo brzo posle Amerike i Srbija se odluńćila na ovaj korak i u junu proŇ°le godine svaki grańĎanin Srbije koji je to Ňĺeleo dobio je 100 evra iz helikoptera. ZaŇ°to se ovaj novac zove helikopter mani, da li u Srbiji ima iste efekte kao i u Americi i zaŇ°to se nova tranŇ°a koja se sprema i u Americi ali i u Srbiji sve ńćeŇ°ńáe zove dron mani?

U Oko magazinu pogledajte i razgovor sa nekadaŇ°njim pevańćem Bijelog dugmeta Alenom Islamovińáem.

Urednik emisije: Gorislav Papińá
Label and copyright: RTS

snippet.title: Povratniku izgorjela kuńáa, spava na sijenu
snippet.description:
Svi koji Ňĺele pomońái Savi da obnovi kuńáu za stanovanje donacije mogu uplatiti na rańćun
UNICREDIT banke Banjaluka. Uplate iz inozemstva mogu se izvrŇ°iti na ime Bilanovińá Savo Podjele b.b, 72260  Busovańća, BiH. SWIFT: BLBABA22, IBAN:BA395517202898435960
Savo Bilanovińá iz Podjela kod Busovańće vratio se svojoj kuńái prije dvadeset godina. MeńĎutim kuńáa koju je obnovio je izgorjela tako da spava u nedovrŇ°enoj kuńái i to u podrumu na ńćetiri bale sijena. Umjesto kreveta ovaj sedamdesetogodiŇ°njak spava na sijenu. Mnoge humanitarne organizacije su obeńáale pomońái Savu da barem dovrŇ°i sprat jedne kuńáe ili obnove onu koja je izgorjela ali sve je zavrŇ°ilo na obeńáanjima. Hońáe li ovaj povratnik dobiti pomońá lokalne zajednice ili ńáe ponovno morati napuŇ°tati svoje ognjiŇ°te na kojem je rońĎen pogledajte u ovoj reportaŇĺi.

snippet.title: Ň†ta je Putin poruńćio svetu | Svet sa Sputnjikom
snippet.description:
U jeku nikad gorih odnosa Rusije i Zapada, uńćestalih ratnih igara NATO-a blizu ruskih granica i rastuńáe napetosti na istoku Ukrajine, ali i ekonomske neizvesnosti u svetu kao posledice pandemije virusa korona, Ň°ef Kremlja Vladimir Putin odrŇĺao je godiŇ°nje obrańáanje Federalnoj skupŇ°tini Rusije.

Programski dokument ruskog lidera redovno privlańći veliku medijsku paŇĺnju jer postavlja osnovne pravce unutraŇ°nje i spoljne politike, daje strateŇ°ke vektore razvoja zemlje u bliŇĺoj perspektivi i ukazuje na kljuńćne probleme i mehanizme za njihovo reŇ°avanje. Po tradiciji, dogańĎaju prisustvuju senatori, poslanici Dume, ńćlanovi vlade, gubernatori, predsednici subjekata federacije, predstavnici verskih zajednica i medija. Imajuńái u vidu sloŇĺene geopolitińćke okolnosti mnogi su ove godine ońćekivali senzacionalne izjave. Kakve je poruke Putin poslao Rusiji i svetu? ZaŇ°to su ga na Zapadu sluŇ°ali sa strepnjom? Ň†ta ńáe biti dalji potezi Putinove Rusije, kakve globalne ciljeve postavlja i kako ńáe ih ostvarivati? Kakvo je mesto u toj politici namenjeno Balkanu i Srbiji?

O ovim i drugim pitanjima u emisiji ‚ÄěSvet sa Sputnjikom‚Äú govore dopisnik ‚ÄěVeńćernjih novosti‚Äú iz Rusije Branko Vlahovińá i general-major u penziji prof. dr Mitar Kovańć.


Emisiju ureńĎuje i vodi Tanja Trikińá.

snippet.title: Queen arrives at chapel for Prince Philip's funeral service
snippet.description:
The Queen arrives at St George's Chapel, where she is greeted by the Dean of Windsor, the Right Reverend David Conner.

Prince Philip's coffin is followed by senior royals, including the Prince of Wales, Princess Royal, and Princes William and Harry.

snippet.title: GUH - POCEO OD NULE (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/guhsajan/
Spotify: uskoro...
Deezer: uskoro...

Muzika i Tekst: GUH
AranŇĺman: @jonezr
Mix i Master: @bogi_batina

Kamera: @jovanradoviic
Directed by: GUH, @jovanradoviic
Video Edit & Post Production: @jovanradoviic
https://www.instagram.com/jovanradoviic‚Äč‚Äč

Tekst/Lyrics:

Poceo od nule vidi gde sam tada bio
Igrao sam igru ko da bila je kazino
Kido
Zajedno smo jaki ko Vegito
Preuzimam scenu nece me spreciti niko  (x2)

Al put je dug znaj da cimo sam se kao nikad pre
Nisam znao nista al u glavi imao sam sve
Laptop, daska , krevet, kamera ja jurim svoje sne
To sam ja GUH SAJAN koji ne odustaje

Bio slep
Nisam znao ko pravi drugar je
Mnogo njih se pravi da to jesu, a mnogi su fejk
Svako gleda svoju korist i to gadi mi se eeej
Moram nositi se stime moram paziti na sve

Ja sam gladan uspeha i idem sada ka svom snu
Sujeta ih jede i to ne mogu da prikriju
Maska dole, Maska gore lica manjaju vam se
Polecem polecem, gore zvezde zovu me

Najgore je to sto ljude vidis samo kao broj
Neki gledaju te i pisu ti kako nisi svoj
Vremenom tek vide kolko to pogresna je vest
JEDAN JE GUH SAJAN I NE POSTOJI COPY PASTE

Kido
Zajedno smo jaki ko Vegito

snippet.title: Rusija zatvorila Kerńćki moreuz, tenzije na istoku Ukrajine
snippet.description:
Nastavlja se rast napetosti izmeńĎu Rusije i Ukrajine.

Rusija je zatvorila prolaz kroz Kerńćki moreuz i time odsjekla ukrajinske luke u Azovskom moru.

Ukrajina smatra da je taj potez ilegalan i da krŇ°i meńĎunarodne sporazume.

Moskva navodi da izvodi vojne vjeŇĺbe i da ńáe trgovańćkim brodovima biti omoguńáen prolaz.

#Rusija #Ukrajina

snippet.title: Kate and Camilla arrive at Duke of Edinburgh's funeral
snippet.description:
The Duchess of Cambridge and the Duchess of Cornwall arrive for the funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh at Windsor Castle.

The Queen and her family gathered to say farewell to the Duke of Edinburgh, who died just over a week ago at Windsor.

Kate Middleton arrived at St George‚Äôs Chapel wearing a pearl necklace known as the Four-Row Japanese Pearl Choker.

The necklace was loaned to Kate by the Queen from the Royal Collection after it was given to Her Majesty by the Japanese Government.

Kate previously wore the statement necklace in 2017 at a dinner to commemorate the 70th wedding anniversary of Prince Philip and the Queen.

Read more here: https://www.independent.co.uk/life-style/royal-family/prince-philip-funeral-kate-middleton-pearl-necklace-meaning-b1833126.html

snippet.title: Queen Arrives at Windsor Castle and Funeral Procession Begins
snippet.description:
Queen Elizabeth II and other members of the Royal Family, including Prince Charles, Prince Edward, Prince Andrew and Princess Anne, joined a procession on Saturday at Windsor Castle ahead of the funeral for Prince Philip.

The service will salute both his service in the Royal Navy and his support for Britain's monarch over three quarters of a century.

#Queen #PrincePhilip #Funeral

snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

snippet.title: The Duke of Edinburgh Laid to Rest in Touching Funeral Service Inside St George's Chapel
snippet.description:
'The Duke of Edinburgh Laid to Rest in Touching Funeral Service Inside St George's Chapel'

Prince Philip was interred in the Royal Vault at St George's Chapel, inside the grounds of Windsor Castle, during a funeral that honoured his lifetime of service to the UK, the crown and his wife of 73 years, Queen Elizabeth II.

The Queen sat alone and apart from other members of the Royal Family during a poignant and touching service. 

#Queen #PrincePhilip #RoyalFamily

snippet.title: Audi RS6 generations DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click¬†https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow¬†and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!

Check this out, RS6 fans - we‚Äôve brought in every generation of the RS6 and they're going head-to-head in an almighty drag race! From the 450hp C5 through to the current 600hp C8, we‚Äôre here to find out just how these four generations of RS6 perform over the quarter-mile. 

As you‚Äôd expect, Mat‚Äôs in his long term RS6, the C8. With a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 under the bonnet, it can produce 600hp & 800Nm of torque. Alongside him, we‚Äôve got Yianni in the C7. It may be powered by the same size engine as the C8, however, it can produce slightly more power (605hp), although it‚Äôs also slightly down on torque (750Nm). 

The C6 may be several years older, but when you consider it‚Äôs powered by a 5-litre twin-turbo V10, it‚Äôs surely got to be in with a shout, right? Or perhaps the C5, with its 4.2-litre twin-turbo V8, could spring a surprise? 

All we know is, there‚Äôs only one way to find out‚Ä¶ LET‚ÄôS RACE!

When Mr Hikmet is given a terminal diagnosis he wonders what will become of the fortune he has worked so hard to amass - he can't leave everything to his frivolous son Emir. But Emir makes his own promise - to punish his father for controlling his life he will treat Reyhan so badly that she is forced to leave him.

snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#BulOnu
#SehYam

How‚Äôs this for a hot hatch showdown - new Volkswagen Golf R vs Mercedes-AMG A45 S! 

On the face of it, these two cars have a lot of similarities. They‚Äôre both hot hatches (obviously), they both have AWD, and they‚Äôre both powered by 2-litre turbocharged petrol engines. 

However, that‚Äôs just about where the similarities end! Starting with the Golf R, it can produce 320hp & 420Nm, while it weighs in at 1,551kg. As for the A45 S, well that can produce 421hp & 500Nm, but it also weighs more than the Golf R, tipping the scales at 1,660kg. 

However, there‚Äôs one key difference between these hot hatches - the price! While the Golf R costs just over ¬£39,000, the A45 S rolls up with a price tag of over ¬£57,000!! 

So is it worth it? You‚Äôll have to keep watching to find out!

As the Covid 19 vaccine rolls out,

and keep the distance

we have to dance

Punińćemo opet Cirih, Dizeldorf i Beńć.
